hero.tagline: AI operations you own and control.
hero.description: Reclaim your time. Turn vision into reality with an AI team that understands your methodology.

header.title: Built for Real Operations
header.subtitle: Not a toy. Not a wrapper. A complete AI operations engine with the depth to run your business.

routing.title: Multi-LLM Routing
routing.promise: Instant intelligence scaled securely across your operations. We direct your strategic requests to the right mind automatically.
routing.technical: Provider-agnostic routing across 4 providers (Claude, Gemini, OpenAI, Ollama) with 20+ models. 4 routing strategies — cost, quality, balanced, speed — automatically select the optimal model for each request. 9 task modalities with intelligent classifier and per-call cost tracking.

assembly.title: Dynamic Identity Assembly
assembly.promise: It speaks like you, knows your projects, and acts like your best partner. Not a generic chatbot—it is your digital clone.
assembly.technical: Every response is built using multi-layer prompt assembly. The system dynamically pulls your identity, brand voice, role profile, relevant knowledge (vector search), memory, and session context before hitting the LLM.

execution.title: Multi-Step Execution
execution.promise: Send one message, and watch an entire team execute a project from logic to completion without babysitting.
execution.technical: Workflow engine with 7 node types (agent, tool, condition, loop, parallel, human-review, sub-workflow) plus event triggers. YAML-defined pipelines chain agents and tools: search the web, analyze results, execute custom scripts, draft content, and request human review — all triggered by a single message or scheduled event.

retrieval.title: Hybrid Knowledge Retrieval
retrieval.promise: Your entire firm's history, methodologies, and data securely mapped and instantly accessible when you need it.
retrieval.technical: FTS5 keyword search combined with deep vector embeddings. Your AI agents find the exact right document or conversational memory every time—understanding intent, not just keyword matching.

pipelines.title: Production Pipelines
pipelines.promise: Real architecture and venture structuring require rigid phases. RealizeOS mimics your actual operational flow perfectly.
pipelines.technical: Structured multi-agent sessions transition through rigid stages: from initial briefing, to data drafting, iterative analysis, final review, and approved deployment.

evolution.title: Continuous Evolution
evolution.promise: Your operations engine gets smarter with every single interaction, constantly closing gaps and refining your playbook.
evolution.technical: 5 evolution types: prompt refinement, skill creation, knowledge gap detection, workflow optimization, and agent behavior tuning. Built-in risk assessment scores each proposed change. Automatic rollback if quality degrades. Full audit trail of every evolution event.

multichannel.title: Multi-Channel Gateway
multichannel.promise: Reach your AI team from anywhere — WhatsApp, Web, Webhooks, or scheduled tasks. One brain, every channel.
multichannel.technical: 5 channel adapters: REST API, Telegram, WhatsApp Cloud API, Web/WebSocket, Webhooks (HMAC-signed). Plus cron-based scheduler. Channel-agnostic message routing with attachment handling.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.promise: Multi-user access control, encrypted credentials, audit trails. Your AI operations, secured.
security.technical: Role-based access control with 16 permissions across 5 default roles. AES-256 encrypted credential vault. Full audit logging with structured events. Prompt injection detection and filtering.

founder.title: Built from Real Operations
founder.p1: RealizeOS was born from the Realization Group's everyday work and challenges, drawn from a production engine that runs international architecture, real estate, and venture operations every single day.
founder.p2: I built this because the alternative was breaking down. Trying to scale physical, complex ventures using scattered, generic AI tools was exhausting. Everything felt fragile. I needed absolute clarity and total control. I built RealizeOS to buy back my freedom — and now you can use our exact engine to reclaim yours.

header.title: Space. Business. Story.
header.subtitle: The Realization Framework — a proven methodology for building AI-powered ventures that feel human and perform like machines.

space.title: Space
space.promise: Every great venture begins with a space — physical or digital. We help you define the boundaries, the flow, and the structure of your operations so nothing is accidental.
space.technical: The FABRIC Foundations layer maps your operational topology: team roles, tool integrations, communication flows, and knowledge repositories. This creates a spatial model that AI agents traverse to understand context and authority.

business.title: Business
business.promise: Strategy without execution is a slideshow. We translate your vision into coordinated AI operations that compound revenue, automate growth, and free you from the middleware.
business.technical: The Agents and Routines layers encode your business logic: pricing models, compliance checks, market analysis workflows, client communication sequences, and vendor coordination. Each process becomes a repeatable, testable, improvable AI skill.

story.title: Story
story.promise: Your brand voice, your authority, your narrative — amplified across every channel without you writing a single draft. The system speaks as you, because it learned from you.
story.technical: The Brand and Creations layers hold your voice identity (vocabulary, tone, formatting rules, examples). Every output — LinkedIn post, proposal, investor update — runs through a quality-assurance agent that enforces brand consistency before delivery.

methodology.footer:
Built from a decade of hands-on architecture, real estate, and venture work.
Now encoded into an AI engine you can deploy in days.

header.title:
Stop Duct-Taping AI Tools
That Forget You
header.subtitle: Most AI setups are a mess of disconnected chatbots, lost context, and manual copy-pasting. Your AI should work as a team, not a collection of strangers.

layers.title: The Friction Trap
layers.description: Your best ideas die in the handoff. You're constantly translating between disconnected tools, watching momentum stall and deadlines slip entirely.

clock.title: Execution Paralysis
clock.description: The overwhelming anxiety of turning a massive physical project into reality. The sheer volume of unstructured details paralyzes your ability to lead.

users.title: Middleware Madness
users.description: You've become the bottleneck. Instead of designing the future, you're manually duct-taping generic AI outputs together at 2 AM. It's exhausting.

painPoints.transition: You shouldn't feel this way. Step out of the middleware and into the visionary seat. Command a coordinated operational engine that builds your reality for you.

header.subtitle: Watch how RealizeOS turns a single message into coordinated agent work — from your knowledge base, in your brand voice.

header.title: From the Ecosystem That Built It
header.subtitle: These aren't hypothetical scenarios — they are live operations running on the same engine you're about to deploy.

boa.title: BOA Architects
boa.quote: We stopped drowning in compliance paperwork. Now the system drafts, reviews, and files — while we focus on designing spaces people actually want to live in.
boa.technical: Multi-agent workflow: a Researcher agent scans updated building codes per municipality, a Writer agent drafts compliance documents, a Reviewer agent flags inconsistencies against the project spec, and a Tools agent auto-files via Google Drive integration. The knowledge base stores 200+ regulatory templates across Portugal, Spain, and Israel.

burtucala.title: Burtucala Real Estate
burtucala.quote: Every market opportunity is surfaced, analyzed, and briefed before we even finish our morning coffee. We went from reactive to proactive overnight.
burtucala.technical: Scheduled intelligence routines run at 06:00 daily: an Analyst agent pulls market data from idealista, INE, and Banco de Portugal APIs. A Writer agent packages findings into a structured brief. A Knowledge agent cross-references against portfolio parameters stored in the vault. Alerts are pushed to Telegram with one-click approval for deeper analysis.

realization.title: Realization Group
realization.quote: I run architecture, real estate, consulting, content, and a SaaS product — all from one control room. The system doesn't just assist, it operates.
realization.technical: Full FABRIC stack deployment: Foundations layer holds identity, brand voice, and strategy documents. The Agent layer coordinates 6 specialized agents across all ventures. Brain layer ensures consistent voice across 4 different brands. Routines layer automates weekly reports, LinkedIn posts, and investor updates. Insights layer tracks cross-venture KPIs. Creations layer outputs client proposals, blog posts, and pitch decks.

header.title: The FABRIC System
header.subtitle: Every system in RealizeOS is organized using a structured knowledge architecture. Six directories. One coherent intelligence.

B.title: Brain
B.description: Domain knowledge your team actually remembers. Market data, expertise, deal history — accessible every conversation.

R.title: Routines
R.description: Workflows that chain agents and tools together. "Draft project narrative" triggers writer, then reviewer — automatically.

I.title: Insights

C.title: Creations
C.description: Deployments that meet your quality standards. Every output lands in an organized, reviewable structure.

delivery.note: Both editions include: Instant Google Drive access, setup guide, community access (Telegram + WhatsApp), and onboarding emails for your first week.

items.question: What do I need to get started?
items.answer:
Lite: Obsidian (free) and a Claude Pro subscription ($20/mo from Anthropic). No coding required.

Full: Python 3.11+, Docker (optional), and API keys for your chosen LLM providers (Anthropic, Google AI, OpenAI, and/or Ollama for local inference).

items.question: Can I host it on my own server?
items.answer: Yes. The Full edition is designed for self-hosting. Deploy with Docker on any VPS, cloud instance, or local machine. Your data stays on your infrastructure.

items.question: Which AI models does it support?
items.answer: The Full edition supports 4 providers — Claude (Anthropic), Gemini (Google), OpenAI, and Ollama (local) — with 20+ models total. 4 routing strategies (cost, quality, balanced, speed) automatically select the optimal model for each task. 9 task modalities ensure the right model handles the right work. The Lite edition works with any Claude model through Claude Code.

items.question: Is my data private?
items.answer: Completely. RealizeOS runs on your machine or server. Your knowledge base, conversations, and business data never leave your infrastructure. Security features include role-based access control (RBAC) with 16 permissions, AES-256 encrypted credential vault, and full audit logging. For maximum privacy, use Ollama for fully local inference — no data leaves your network at all.

items.question: What if I need help setting up?
items.answer: The Setup Assistance package ($499) includes a 1-hour call where we configure your system together — brand voice, agents, first workflow, everything. After purchase, you'll receive a detailed prep checklist. You can also reach out via email at any time.

items.question: Do I get updates?
items.answer: Yes. As an owner of the system, you get access to all updates via the GitHub repository. Pull the latest changes whenever you want — on your schedule, not ours.

items.question: Can I manage multiple businesses with one system?
items.answer: Absolutely. RealizeOS is built for multi-venture operators. Each business gets its own system with isolated agents, knowledge base, and brand voice. One engine, as many ventures as you need.

items.question: What happens after I purchase?
items.answer:
Immediately: you'll get access to download your package (Lite) or the GitHub repo (Full). You'll also receive a welcome email with your setup guide and a video walkthrough.

Join the community: Telegram Builders Group & WhatsApp Community

Over the next week, you'll get onboarding emails with tips for defining your brand, customizing agents, and building your first workflow.

items.question: Is there a refund policy?
items.answer: If you're not satisfied within 14 days of purchase, reach out and we'll make it right. We want you to succeed with RealizeOS, not feel trapped.
